datum_strategy.scheme: assembly-oriented enclosure datum using the PCB mount face, connector opening, and mounting hole pattern
notes: Use connector datum, sealing interface, and mounting pattern as launch drawing QA references only.

tolerance_policy.general: Carry source critical dimensions forward; do not infer additional geometric tolerances.
notes: Connector datum and seal groove depth are controlled by the source quality metadata.

critical_features.description: Outer housing envelope communicates the 172 mm by 126 mm by 50 mm controller enclosure footprint.
critical_features.reason: Defines vehicle package and fixture envelope context.

critical_features.description: Internal cavity communicates electronics volume and top-down PCB insertion intent.
critical_features.reason: Protects PCB loading and cavity cleanliness review.

critical_features.description: Rear connector opening and datum support connector seating and side-probe access.
critical_features.reason: Controls connector fit and EOL probing access.

critical_features.description: Four housing mounting holes establish fixture and closeout pattern references.
critical_features.reason: Supports cover fastening clearance and fixture location.

critical_features.description: Seal interface represents the gasket compression path around the cover opening.
critical_features.reason: Protects sealing durability and gasket confirmation at assembly closeout.

required_dimensions.label: Rear connector opening width
required_dimensions.reason: Carries connector-side fit and probe access intent.

required_dimensions.label: Rear connector opening length
required_dimensions.reason: Carries connector datum and fit intent.

required_dimensions.label: Mounting hole diameters
required_dimensions.reason: Confirms the shared mounting and fixture hole size.

required_dimensions.label: Mounting hole column spacing
required_dimensions.reason: Captures the horizontal spacing from x=20 mm to x=152 mm.

required_dimensions.label: Mounting hole row spacing
required_dimensions.reason: Captures the vertical spacing from y=20 mm to y=106 mm.

required_dimensions.label: Cover sealing groove depth
required_dimensions.reason: Carries the gasket compression critical dimension.

required_notes.text: Material: AL6061 casting with machined connector datum and sealing surfaces.
Assembly closeout requires six screws tightened to 0.85 Nm with digital torque trace.
EOL release requires barcode pairing, gasket confirmation, vision confirmation, and electrical functional pass.
